title: Judy Robe & Spirit Awards
intro: The Judy Robe & Spirit Awards celebrate the hearts of each PYT production. Presented just before the first performance of every show, they honor the performers whose dedication, generosity, and ensemble spirit make our shows possible. The Judy Robe Award goes to the ensemble member who best embodies the values of our beloved supporter Judy Robe. Spirit Awards goes to three or four performers each show, who represent PYT's values of Braveness, Boldness, and Kindness throughout the production run.
